title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 successfully completed Pokémon FireRed using only vision on raw game screenshots without maps or helper systems. This demonstrates improved visual understanding compared to earlier Claude models that required complex helper harness infrastructure.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only vision on raw game screenshots, without maps or helper systems. This matters because earlier Claude models needed complex helper harness infrastructure to play the game, so removing that scaffolding isolates gains in the model's own visual understanding. The takeaway is a demonstration of stronger multimodal capability: the model reads and acts on raw frames directly rather than relying on external tooling to interpret game state.
